items.name: Inbound Support
items.description: Enterprise-grade inbound support solutions powered by AI. Optimize your customer service with intelligent call routing, advanced IVR, and real-time omnichannel analytics.

hero.subtitle: Next-Gen AI Customer Service
hero.description: Transform your support center into a high-performance growth engine. Our AI-driven inbound solutions ensure every customer reaches the right agent at the perfect moment, reducing wait times and boosting CSAT scores.

features.title: Skill-Based Routing
features.description: Automatically route callers to the most qualified agent based on expertise, language, and historical data.

features.title: AI-Powered Conversational IVR
features.description: Replace rigid touch-tone menus with natural language processing that resolves 60% of routine queries.

features.title: Real-time Sentiment Analysis
features.description: Monitor caller emotions in real-time. Automatically flag frustrated customers for immediate supervisor escalation.

features.title: Queue Callback & SMS
features.description: Eliminate hold times by offering automated callbacks or switching to convenient asynchronous SMS support.

features.title: Omnichannel CRM Sync
features.description: Instant screen pops with full customer history from Salesforce, HubSpot, or Zendesk for personalized service.

features.title: Smart Overflow Management
features.description: Dynamically adjust routing rules during peak volume to maintain SLAs and prevent customer churn.

howItWorks.title: Configure Routing
howItWorks.description: Define rules based on agent skills, customer priority, or inquiry type using our visual builder.

howItWorks.title: AI Training
howItWorks.description: Our AI learns from your knowledge base to handle routine queries autonomously through natural language.

howItWorks.title: Real-time Optimization
howItWorks.description: Monitor performance live and adjust routing dynamically to maintain peak service levels.

faqs.question: What is skill-based routing?
faqs.answer: Skill-based routing is a strategy that assigns incoming calls to the most qualified agent based on their expertise, language, and case history, rather than just choosing the first available agent.

faqs.question: Can I integrate my existing CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes, VestaCall offers native, zero-code integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, and more, allowing for instant screen pops and automatic data synchronization.

faqs.question: How does the AI-powered IVR improve CX?
faqs.answer: By using natural language processing instead of rigid menus, customers can simply state their needs, leading to faster resolution and a more human-like interaction.

items.name: Outbound Sales
items.description: Accelerate your sales cycle with AI-powered predictive dialers, local presence tools, and real-time conversation intelligence designed for high-performance sales teams.

hero.subtitle: High-Velocity Sales Acceleration
hero.description: Empower your sales organization with the tools to connect faster and close more deals. From predictive dialing to local presence, VestaCall maximizes every outbound interaction.

features.title: Predictive Dialer Software
features.description: AI algorithms predict agent availability and dial multiple numbers simultaneously to eliminate idle time.

features.title: Dynamic Local Presence
features.description: Boost answer rates by 400% by automatically displaying a local caller ID that matches the lead's location.

features.title: Conversation Intelligence
features.description: Real-time AI analysis of talk-to-listen ratios and keyword detection to coach agents during live calls.

features.title: TCPA Compliance Suite
features.description: Stay compliant with built-in scrubbers for DNC lists and automated consent verification workflows.

features.title: CRM Power Dialer
features.description: Trigger dialer sequences directly from within Salesforce, HubSpot, or Microsoft Dynamics with one click.

benefits: Increase talk time by up to 300%

howItWorks.title: Upload Leads
howItWorks.description: Import leads directly from your CRM or CSV and segment them into high-priority campaigns.

howItWorks.title: Activate Dialer
howItWorks.description: Choose between Predictive, Power, or Preview dialing modes based on your workflow needs.

howItWorks.title: Scale Outreach
howItWorks.description: Let the AI handle the dialing while your agents focus solely on having meaningful conversations.

faqs.question: What is a predictive dialer?
faqs.answer: A predictive dialer is an automated system that calls several numbers at once and uses algorithms to connect an available agent as soon as a live person answers, significantly reducing idle time.

faqs.question: How does local presence work?
faqs.answer: Our system identifies the area code of the number being dialed and automatically selects a local number from our pool to display as the Caller ID, making the lead more likely to answer.

faqs.question: Is your dialer TCPA compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes, VestaCall includes robust TCPA compliance features, including automated DNC list scrubbing and human-initiated dialing options for regulated industries.

items.name: Global Remote Teams
items.description: Unify your distributed workforce with enterprise-grade voice, video, and collaboration tools. Enable seamless remote work with global local presence and carrier-grade reliability.

hero.subtitle: Unified Communication for the Modern Workspace
hero.description: Connect your global workforce with crystal-clear voice, HD video, and seamless collaboration tools. Power your remote work strategy with a platform as distributed as your team.

features.title: Global Virtual Numbers
features.description: Instantly provision local, national, and toll-free numbers in 100+ countries to establish a local presence anywhere.

features.title: Cloud PBX on Mobile & Web
features.description: Your business phone system follows you everywhere. Full-featured apps for iOS, Android, and Desktop.

features.title: Cross-Border SIP Trunking
features.description: Connect remote offices with high-quality VoIP termination, ensuring low latency and high ASR regardless of location.

features.title: Integrated Video & Chat
features.description: One platform for voice, HD video conferencing, and team messaging to keep distributed teams perfectly synchronized.

features.title: Global Billing Precision
features.description: Optimized cost management with 1-second billing increments and a unified dashboard for all global communications.

benefits: Secure remote access with TLS/SRTP encryption
Unified inbox for voice, chat, and email

howItWorks.title: Provision Globally
howItWorks.description: Select and activate local phone numbers in any of our 100+ supported countries instantly.

howItWorks.title: Onboard Teams
howItWorks.description: Invite users and assign them extensions, roles, and call permissions via our intuitive web portal.

howItWorks.title: Connect Anywhere
howItWorks.description: Your team logs in from any device and has immediate access to your full enterprise communication suite.

faqs.question: Can we keep our existing phone numbers?
faqs.answer: Yes, VestaCall supports full number portability. We handle the technical heavy lifting to move your existing global numbers to our cloud network.

faqs.question: Is the connection secure for remote workers?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All voice traffic is encrypted using TLS and SRTP protocols, ensuring your business data remains private over any internet connection.

faqs.question: How do we manage costs for a global team?
faqs.answer: Our unified billing platform gives you real-time visibility into usage across all regions, utilizing 1-second billing precision to ensure you only pay for what you use.

items.name: Enterprise
items.description: Scalable, secure, and carrier-grade communication infrastructure designed for global enterprises. Benefit from advanced compliance, private cloud deployments, and dedicated account management.

hero.subtitle: Global Infrastructure. Enterprise Scale.
hero.description: The foundation for your large-scale communication needs. VestaCall Enterprise provides the security, compliance, and custom-tailored reliability required by the world's leading organizations.

features.title: Private Cloud & Hybrid Deployment
features.description: Deploy our communication stack within your own VPC or leverage our private cloud for maximum control and data sovereignty.

features.title: Advanced Security & SSO
features.description: Enterprise-grade security with SAML 2.0 based Single Sign-On, Multi-Factor Authentication, and granular role-based access controls.

features.title: Global Regulatory Compliance
features.description: Full compliance with HIPAA, GDPR, PCI-DSS, and SOC 2 Type II. We handle the complexity of global voice regulations for you.

features.title: Dedicated NOC & TAM
features.description: 24/7 dedicated Network Operations Center monitoring and a Technical Account Manager for proactive strategy and support.

features.title: Elastic Carrier Services
features.description: Unlimited capacity for SIP trunks and CCaaS seats with geo-redundancy and automatic failover across 15 global data centers.

howItWorks.title: Infrastructure Audit
howItWorks.description: Our engineers conduct a deep-dive audit of your current voice architecture and compliance requirements.

howItWorks.title: Custom Implementation
howItWorks.description: We build and test a custom migration strategy, including API integrations and security configurations.

howItWorks.title: Priority Launch
howItWorks.description: Execute a zero-downtime transition with dedicated onsite or remote support from your Enterprise TAM.

faqs.question: Can you provide geo-redundant deployments?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Enterprise tier includes active-active geo-redundancy across multiple global regions, ensuring that your communication remains online even during major regional outages.

faqs.question: Do you support custom security requirements?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We routinely work with enterprise security teams to implement custom firewall configurations, dedicated IP whitelisting, and specialized encryption protocols.

faqs.question: What kind of support SLA is provided?
faqs.answer: VestaCall Enterprise includes a binding 99.999% uptime SLA and 24/7/365 access to our Tier-3 engineering team with a guaranteed <15 minute response for critical issues.
